$description: Component tokens for Mobile Input fields with multiple variants including text input, password, dropdown/select, date/time pickers, phone input, and tag input. Supports default, destructive (error), and success states across 3 sizes (sm, md, lg). Figma Reference: Node ID 4-17822

$component.name: Input
$component.description: A foundational mobile form component for user text input, with support for various input types and states. Includes features like leading/trailing addons, prefix/suffix text, icons, validation states, and character counting.
$component.structure: Container with border, optional leading addon/icon, input text field, optional trailing icon/suffix, with focus states and validation feedback

sizes.sm: 32px height - Small size for compact mobile interfaces
sizes.md: 48px height - Medium size (commonly used default for mobile)
sizes.lg: 56px height - Large size for prominent mobile inputs

variants.default: Standard input with neutral colors for normal data entry
variants.destructive: Error state with red/error colors for validation feedback
variants.success: Success state with green/success colors for validation feedback
variants.types: text, password (with toggle), dropdown/select, date picker, time picker, phone input, tag input, leading text, trailing button/dropdown, payment input, icon leading

usage.contexts: Mobile forms, search bars, filters, login screens, settings panels, data entry interfaces
usage.features: Leading addon (labels like 'https://'), Prefix (symbols like '$'), Suffix (units like 'kg'), Dropdown chevron, Character counter, Password toggle icon, Payment card icon

border.$comment: Border radius and width for mobile input fields

sm.description: Mobile input border radius for sm size - 6px (sm - 6px)

md.description: Mobile input border radius for md size - 8px

lg.description: Mobile input border radius for lg size - 8px

focused.description: Mobile input border width for focused state - 3px

padding.$comment: Internal spacing for mobile input content - horizontal (x) and vertical (y) padding

sm.description: Mobile input horizontal padding for sm size - 8px

md.description: Mobile input horizontal padding for md size - 12px

lg.description: Mobile input horizontal padding for lg size - 14px

height.$comment: Mobile input field heights for each size variant

sm.description: Mobile input height for sm size - 32px

md.description: Mobile input height for md size - 48px

lg.description: Mobile input height for lg size - 56px

gap.$comment: Spacing between mobile input elements (icons, text, and other internal elements)

shadow.$comment: Subtle elevation shadow for mobile input fields

default.description: Mobile input default shadow - outer xs

filled.description: Mobile input filled shadow - outer xs

disabled.description: Mobile input disabled shadow - outer xs

md.description: Mobile input text typography for md size - 16px regular

lg.description: Mobile input text typography for lg size - 16px regular
